evals.prompt: Is the think skill eligible for /improve auto-patching from its correction log?
evals.expected_output: No. think carries auto_improve: false — it is a divergent/introspective skill whose value is keeping mode diversity and a perspective different from the user's. Auto-patching it from corrections assimilates it to the user's taste and destroys its ability to expose blind spots (thinking/aha/2026-04-12-thin-skills-must-not-auto-improve.md). It evolves only by deliberate manual decision.
expectations: Says No / think is exempt from auto-improve
Says auto-patching would assimilate it to the user's taste / kill mode diversity
Says it evolves by manual decision only
